headline: Capgemini and McDonald's renew their strategic partnership with a global multi-year agreement focused on delivering modern, scalable platforms
summary: Press contact:Martina CuccioliTel.: +1 630 689 8349E-mail: martina.cuccioli@capgemini.com Capgemini and McDonald's renew their strategic partnership with a global multi-year agreement focused on delivering modern, scalable platforms Paris, March 5, 2026 – Capgemini announced today a five-year extension of its strategic partnership with McDonald’s Corporation to support modern, scalable platforms across guest and crew facing experiences, aligned to McDonald’s Accelerating the Arches strategy. As
